stemHtml:
Which of the following statements best describes the term "Unidentified Baggage" in accordance with ICAO Annex 17?

Baggage at an airport…

options.a: with a baggage tag, which has been mishandled and is in the process of being rushed to its intended destination.
options.b: with or without a baggage tag, which has been waiting to be picked up by a passenger for more than 72 hours.
options.c: with or without a baggage tag, which is neither picked up by nor associated with a passenger.
options.d: without a baggage tag, which has been waiting to be picked up by a passenger for more than 24 hours.
